summary: Iteration 21 - Tricky Testament 5x5 Jeopardy Grid & Gaming Central Entitlements Testing. All 11 features tested and verified. Backend: 4/4 API tests passed. Frontend: Tricky Testament shows 5x5 grid (25 tiles) with 'Full Board' badge for authenticated users, Gaming Central shows unlock badges and 'Full question bank' text.
critical_code_review_comments: TrickyTestamentGame.js: 5x5 grid correctly implemented with CSS grid-cols-5. Categories rendered as headers, then tiles row-by-row (100, 200, 300, 400, 500 point values).
TrickyTestamentGame.js: access_level badge (data-testid='access-level-badge') correctly shows 'Full Board' for full access, 'Demo Board' for demo users.
TrickyTestamentGame.js: Counter correctly shows 0/25 Answered for full board (5 categories x 5 point values).
TrickyTestamentGame.js: Post-game conversion prompt (data-testid='post-game-conversion') only renders when accessLevel === 'demo'.
GamingCentral.js: Correctly fetches entitlements using soul_food_token and displays unlock badges with data-testid attributes.
GamingCentral.js: 'Your Game Access' section shows 3 cards: Question Bank, Game Duration, Lesson Audio with correct entitlement-based content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tricky Testament 5x5 grid fully tested. Key data-testids: access-level-badge, jeopardy-board, category-header-{0-4}, tile-{catIndex}-{rowIndex}. Gaming Central entitlements work correctly when soul_food_token is present in localStorage. Demo users see 5x2 board (100-200 only), full users see 5x5 (100-500).

GET_entitlements_me_no_auth.details: Returns access_level=demo, empty series array, has_audio=false, has_instructor=false

GET_entitlements_me_admin_auth.details: Returns access_level=full, series=[holiday_4c, breakfast], editions=[adult, youth], has_audio=true, has_instructor=true

GET_for_game_admin_auth.details: Returns 80 questions, access_level=full, unlocked_series=[holiday_4c, breakfast, shared]

tricky_testament_5x5_grid.details: 25 tiles present (5 categories x 5 point values 100-500)

tricky_testament_5_category_headers.details: 5 category headers: Covenant (4Cs), Cross & Redemption, Women of Wisdom, Faith in Motion, Deep Cuts

tricky_testament_counter_0_25.details: Counter shows '0/25 Answered' for full board

tricky_testament_tile_click_opens_questi.details: Clicking tile-0-0 opens question view, board is hidden

gaming_central_unlock_badges.details: Shows 'Holiday 4C's Unlocked', 'Break*fast Unlocked', 'Lesson Audio' badges for authenticated admin

gaming_central_full_question_bank_text.details: Game cards show 'Full question bank — 4C's, Break*fast' for authenticated users

gaming_central_your_game_access_section.details: Shows 3 cards: Question Bank (Full pool unlocked), Game Duration (3-Hour Pass Instructor), Lesson Audio (Included with purchase)
